subcodes.first_line: In political affairs we have never intervened, for Bahá'u'lláh hath, through the explicit text, forbidden us from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در امور سیاسیه هیچ وقت مداخله ننمودیم زیرا حضرت بهاء الله بنص صریح ما را از
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @unity of governments; political unity, @spiritual transformation, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @unity; oneness of humanity, @non-participation in politics
